heading: Payments from Senate contingent fund
label: 6503 Payments from Senate contingent fund
text: No payment shall be made from the contingent fund of the Senate unless sanctioned by the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate. Payments made upon vouchers or abstracts of disbursements of salaries approved by said Committee shall be deemed, held, and taken, and are declared to be conclusive upon all the departments and officers of the Government: , That no payment shall be made from said contingent fund as additional salary or compensation to any officer or employee of the Senate.Provided
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 68 of this titleSection is based on provisions of last par. on , , relating to payments from contingent fund of Senate.
